summary: Set 052 Session 2 of 3 (Implementation, verdict D1-D7). Shipped the dead-cost-icon fix. D1 (root cause): new shared tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/routerConfig.ts resolves the metrics filename from router-config.yaml metrics.log_filename (default router-metrics.jsonl); utils/metrics.ts reader (readMetrics + readMetricsFromPath) and the CSV export both route through it (no second hardcoded name) - the dashboard previously read a hardcoded ai_router/metrics.jsonl the router never wrote to. Reconciled MetricsEntry to the on-disk schema (session_number not the never-emitted session_num; optional call_type; reader drops adjudication rows). D3 (tier gate): dabblerSessionSets.routesCost context key set in extension.ts from a resolvable workspace ai_router/router-config.yaml (folder existence alone insufficient); package.json gates the view/title icon AND the command-palette entry; absent on Lightweight. D4 (staleness): computeStaleness reuses metadata.pricing_reviewed + review_frequency_days (default 30; missing/invalid = stale), computed in-extension; non-blocking banner with an Update-cost-estimates action. D5 (three honest states): disabled (names the REAL metrics.enabled knob, never the fictional config.py METRICS_ENABLED) / on-but-empty / on-with-data + a defensive no-router state, via pure dashboard/dashboardHtml.ts builders; CostDashboard is now a selectCostState state machine. D6: update-rates opens router-config.yaml at the metadata/metrics anchor; no Config Editor pricing section (not cheap); CSP-safe button wiring. D2: no metrics default change (already on). DEVIATION (flagged for S3 verifier): D7 Layer-3 icon smoke pivoted to a deterministic gate-wiring guard (costDashboardGate.test.ts) because VS Code view/title actions duplicate-render in the DOM and overflow past the first action, making them non-deterministic to assert in Playwright (no codebase precedent; mirrors migration-cta-v4.spec.ts reasoning) - net no Layer-3 coverage added for the new panel. Tests: 584 unit pass / 2 pre-existing Set-026 fails (untouched files); session-sets-tree Layer-3 5/5 green; tsc clean. Watcher allowlist line bumped 153->172 (line-shift gotcha). $0 routed; cumulative Set 052 $0.048427 of $10 NTE.

reason.specifics: S3 (Docs, UAT, close-out) continues the same Claude trajectory: docs reconciliation (remove fictional config.py METRICS_ENABLED references), compiling the elected UAT checklist, version bump + CHANGELOG + CLAUDE.md walk, and cross-provider verification of the S2 implementation. The audit + implementation context already lives in this orchestrator's working memory; no blocker or cost reason to switch providers. S3 MUST run cross-provider IV&V covering the S2 code (deferred from S2 per spec) and ratify the D7 Layer-3 -> gate-wiring-guard deviation.
